name: Login search csv products and navigate to checkout

steps.name: Given End to end user is logged into BigBasket
When End to end user searches and adds checkout products from csv
And End to end user opens the basket
And End to end user increases the product quantity
And End to end user clicks Checkout button
Then End to end user should reach checkout page

Login search csv products and navigate to checkout log

fullName: BigBasket End To End Checkout: Login search csv products and navigate to checkout
